targets.rawSql:
WITH bounds AS (
  SELECT MAX(datum::date) AS max_date
  FROM xl_projecttimes
),
window_params AS (
  SELECT
    max_date,
    (max_date - INTERVAL '182 day')::date AS start_date,
    (182 - (182 / 7.0))::numeric AS working_days
  FROM bounds
),
daily_net AS (
  SELECT
    datum::date AS work_date,
    mitarbeiter,
    MAX(bereich_neu) AS service_department,
    MIN(ma_kat) AS status,
    ROUND(
      CASE
        WHEN MIN(ma_kat) = 'RW' AND SUM(dauer) > 9 THEN SUM(dauer) - 0.75
        WHEN MIN(ma_kat) = 'RW' AND SUM(dauer) > 6 THEN SUM(dauer) - 0.5
        ELSE SUM(dauer)
      END::numeric,
      2
    ) AS net_total
  FROM xl_projecttimes
  WHERE datum::date >= (SELECT start_date FROM window_params)
    AND datum::date <= (SELECT max_date FROM window_params)
    AND ('${service:raw}' = '$__all' OR bereich_neu = ANY(ARRAY[${service:sqlstring}]::text[]))
    AND ('${activity:raw}' = '$__all' OR task_new = ANY(ARRAY[${activity:sqlstring}]::text[]))
    AND ('${employee:raw}' = '$__all' OR mitarbeiter = ANY(ARRAY[${employee:sqlstring}]::text[]))
    AND ma_kat IS NOT NULL
    AND ('${ma_kat:raw}' = '$__all' OR ma_kat = ANY(ARRAY[${ma_kat:sqlstring}]::text[]))
  GROUP BY datum::date, mitarbeiter
),
agg AS (
  SELECT
    mitarbeiter AS employee,
    MAX(service_department) AS service_department,
    MIN(status) AS status,
    ROUND(SUM(net_total)::numeric, 2) AS total
  FROM daily_net
  GROUP BY mitarbeiter
)
SELECT
  employee AS "Employee",
  service_department AS "Service department",
  status AS "Status",
  total AS "total",
  ROUND((total / (SELECT working_days FROM window_params))::numeric, 2) AS "Average per 6 Month"
FROM agg
ORDER BY "Average per 6 Month" DESC

list.label: Service
list.name: service
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT bereich_neu FROM xl_projecttimes WHERE bereich_neu IS NOT NULL ORDER BY bereich_neu

list.label: Activity
list.name: activity
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT task_new FROM xl_projecttimes WHERE task_new IS NOT NULL ORDER BY task_new

list.label: Employee
list.name: employee
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT mitarbeiter FROM xl_projecttimes WHERE mitarbeiter IS NOT NULL ORDER BY mitarbeiter
